character.name: cosmic abstract god of a dying experiment: a slow vortex of ash-grey and gold light collapsing inward, fragments of shattered halos orbiting, the silhouette of vast shoulders slumped with grief, radiating restrained apocalyptic power, GBA-era 16-bit pixel art, dark outline, muted dusk palette, grim dark fantasy
